situation: audit-2026-07-08-046 finding SP-SRV-M-005: routes.js GET /predictions 502 response included 'detail: err.message' leaking internal error details (stack traces, upstream URLs, DB paths) to clients. Information disclosure risk.
action: Removed 'detail: err.message' from 502 JSON response in GET /predictions catch block. Console.error retains full error for ops; client receives generic message with retry hint only. Committed to existing opt-routes-1783141439 worktree (route-fix reuse).
outcome_evidence: Commit ec2ea6f on auto/opt-routes-1783141439 pushed to origin. diff confirms detail field removed; console.error preserved.
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending medium fix: SP-ENG-M-001 calibration-math.js NaN when all dimension errors Infinity
或 SP-ENG-M-005 prediction-engine.js gaussian sigma=0 division by zero

audit_findings.finding: 502 response leaks err.message to client via 'detail' field — information disclosure (stack traces, upstream URLs, DB paths)
audit_findings.remediation: Remove detail field; keep console.error for ops visibility
